summary: Iteration 75 - Enhanced Transaction Modeler features fully tested. All timeframe selector buttons (1yr, 3yr, 5yr, 10yr, 20yr) working. ProjectionChart component displays correctly with proper Y-axis scaling (values scale up with longer timeframes) and X-axis scaling (year markers adjust based on timeframe). All 5 tabs (Property, Fund, Stock, ETF, Crypto) function correctly with scenario analysis. Crypto tab shows volatility warning. Summary cards update for selected timeframe.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectionChart component correctly renders SVG line charts with multiple scenarios
Y-axis scales appropriately: 1yr fund shows $106.9K max vs 20yr fund shows $379.8K max
X-axis year markers adjust correctly: 1yr shows 'Now' to '1yr', 20yr shows 'Now', '5yr', '10yr', '15yr', '20yr'
ValueSummaryCards component correctly displays 'Value at Year X' based on selected timeframe
Crypto volatility warning displays correctly: 'Crypto assets are highly volatile. Projections show a wide range of outcomes.'
3-scenario analysis (Conservative 5%, Moderate 8%, Aggressive 12%) displays correctly for Stock/ETF/Crypto tabs
Model button text dynamically updates: 'Model Scenario (X Year Projection)' based on timeframe selection
Property tab still shows upfront costs, annual cash flow, and projections correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified Enhanced Transaction Modeler features: 1) Timeframe selector with 5 buttons (1yr, 3yr, 5yr, 10yr, 20yr) all functional with data-testid='timeframe-Xyr', 2) ProjectionChart component renders SVG charts with proper scaling - Y-axis adjusts to max value (e.g., $65K for 1yr crypto vs $9.5M for 20yr aggressive), 3) X-axis shows dynamic year markers based on timeframe, 4) Fund tab shows single projection line with ValueSummaryCards showing 'Value at Year X', 'Total Return', 'Annualized Return', 5) Stock/ETF/Crypto tabs show 3-scenario analysis (Conservative/Moderate/Aggressive), 6) Crypto tab prominently displays volatility warning, 7) Model button text updates with selected timeframe, 8) Property tab unchanged - still shows upfront costs, cash flow, projections. Note: Stock/ETF/Crypto generate projections locally (MOCKED), Fund calls backend API. localStorage.setItem('wealth_command_compliance_v5', 'permanent') bypasses compliance modal.

features_verified.fund_tab_projection_chart: PASS - Shows single line projection with correct timeframe scaling
features_verified.etf_tab_3_scenario_chart: PASS - Shows Conservative, Moderate, Aggressive scenarios
features_verified.crypto_tab_volatility_warning: PASS - 'Crypto assets are highly volatile' warning displayed
features_verified.crypto_tab_3_scenario_chart: PASS - Shows 3 scenarios with configurable return rates
features_verified.chart_y_axis_scaling: PASS - Y-axis scales based on max projected value (e.g., $65K for 1yr vs $9.5M for 20yr aggressive crypto)
features_verified.chart_x_axis_scaling: PASS - X-axis shows appropriate year markers (1yr: Now-1yr, 5yr: Now-1yr-2yr-3yr-4yr-5yr, 20yr: Now-5yr-10yr-15yr-20yr)
features_verified.summary_cards_timeframe_values: PASS - Shows 'Value at Year X' matching selected timeframe
features_verified.model_button_text_updates: PASS - Button shows 'Model Scenario (X Year Projection)' based on selection
features_verified.property_tab_upfront_costs: PASS - Shows Deposit, Stamp Duty, Legal & Other, Total Cash Required
features_verified.property_tab_cash_flow: PASS - Shows Rental Income, Loan Repayments, Net Cash Flow, Gearing indicator
features_verified.property_tab_projections: PASS - Shows Capital Growth, Rental Income, Total Return for selected timeframe
